arts.ttl: A former Real Madrid player reveals a fierce fight in the team's locker room: "I'll kill you, I'll rip your head off!"
arts.sum: Rafael Alkorta, a Real Madrid player from 1993 to 1997, has revealed a fight that happened in the locker room during his years with the team. The detail that confirms that the fight Alkorta talks about was in the Real Madrid dressing room

arts.ttl: Report: £45m player is now planning to leave Arsenal for Barcelona this summer
Carlo Ancelotti explains Martin Odegaard Real Madrid transfer verdict as Arsenal stance clear
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti believes Martin Odegaard has become one of the best midfielders in Europe since leaving Real Madrid for Arsenal. Arteta was also quizzed on Odegaard and his impact since joining Arsenal from Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: 'Over two legs': Sol Campbell predicts who's going to win Champions League quarter-final - Arsenal or Real Madrid
Arsenal transfer news: Gunners 'keeping tabs' on 17-year-old plying trade in EFL
arts.sum: Arsenal are allegedly monitoring any developments with a 17-year-old who has recently made the breakthrough into the squad of a League Two club.

arts.ttl: ‘6th muscle injury this season’ – Injury-prone worry for Arsenal player can see quick purchase and sale
arts.sum: Arsenal’s Nuno Tavares has been out on loan since the start of the 2022/23 season. Last summer, Arsenal let the Tavares join Lazio on loan with an obligation to buy if certain conditions are met. arts.ttl: Bid prepared: Arsenal line up €30m transfer raid on CL opponents Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly lining up a €30m transfer bid for Real Madrid’s talented young attacking midfielder Arda Guler. The Turkey international has struggled to establish himself as a regular starter during his time at the Bernabeu, despite long being regarded as an outstanding prospect. arts.ttl: 11 players to miss Arsenal vs Real Madrid after Thibaut Courtois update and announcement made
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka, having only just returned from injury, has not been included in an Arsenal starting XI since December but after 26 minutes on his return against Fulham followed by 45 minutes in this past weekend's clash with Everton, he is expected to be named from the off. Thibaut Courtois has also been on the sidelines for the last few weeks but is expected to be available and that was confirmed by him being named in Madrid's travelling squad on Monday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star told to 'step up' as Mikel Arteta forced into decision for Real Madrid tie
arts.sum: Arsenal will be without centre-back Gabriel Magalhaes for both legs of their Champions League quarter-final clash with Real Madrid, forcing Mikel Arteta to trust one of his fringe players
